National Health Act 2014

Active

Establishes a framework for the regulation, development, and management of a national health system.

Nigeria2014Impact: High

Basic Health Care Provision Fund

Active

Funding mechanism to provide basic minimum package of health services.

Nigeria2018Impact: High

National Drug Policy

Active

Regulates drug manufacturing, importation and distribution.

Nigeria2005Impact: Medium

National Health Insurance Authority Act

Active

Mandatory health insurance coverage for all Nigerians.

Nigeria2022Impact: High

National Health Insurance Bill

Active

Universal health coverage through a single-payer national health insurance fund.

Active

Framework for ensuring access to affordable essential medicines.

Active

Active

Active

Social health insurance program providing coverage for basic healthcare.

Ghana Health Service Act

Active

Establishment of the Ghana Health Service for implementing health policies.

Ghana1996Impact: High

Universal Health Insurance Law

Active

Progressive rollout of mandatory health insurance for all Egyptian citizens.

100 Million Healthy Lives Initiative

Active

Mass screening campaign for Hepatitis C, NCDs, and other conditions.

Egypt2019Impact: High

Health Extension Program

Active

Community-based primary healthcare delivery through health extension workers.

Active

Amine (Generalized Mandatory Health Insurance)

Active

Extension of mandatory health insurance coverage to all citizens.
